with open(path_h, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_db = json.load(f)
type(hadith_db), len(hadith_db)

# Inspect sample entries that may match around "مفاتيح الغيب" or "مفاتيح" etc
def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics marks
    if s is None:
        return None
    # unify Arabic hamza forms, remove tatweel, punctuation
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # normalize hamza variants
    s = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('[يى]', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('[هة]', lambda m: 'ه' if m.group(0)=='ة' else m.group(0), s)
    # remove tashkeel
    TASHKEEL = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]')
    s = re.sub(TASHKEEL, '', s)
    # punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def search_hadith(term):
    norm = normalize(term)
    matches = []
    for i,h in enumerate(hadith_db):
        for field in ['Matn','hadithTxt','title']:
            txt = h.get(field)
            if not txt:
                continue
            if norm and normalize(txt).find(norm)>=0:
                matches.append((i, field, txt[:120]))
                break
    return matches

matches = search_hadith("مفاتيح الغيب خمس لا يعلمهن الا الله")
len(matches)

orig = "مفاتيح الغيب خمس لا يعلمهن إلا الله"
cand1 = "مِفْتَاحُ الْغَيْبِ خَمْسٌ لَا يَعْلَمُهَا إِلَّا اللهُ"
cand2 = "مَفَاتِحُ الْغَيْبِ خَمْسٌ"
cand3 = "فِي خَمْسٍ لَا يَعْلَمُهُنَّ إِلَّا اللهُ"
def normalize_basic(s):
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # remove tashkeel
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # unify
    s = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('[يى]', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ؤ','و', s)
    s = re.sub('ئ','ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ة','ه', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

def lcs(a, b):
    # longest common subsequence length
    a2, b2 = a, b
    n, m = len(a2), len(b2)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a2[i-1]==b2[j-1]:
                dp[j]=prev+1
            else:
                dp[j]=max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def sim(a,b):
    a_n = normalize_basic(a)
    b_n = normalize_basic(b)
    l = lcs(a_n, b_n)
    return l/max(len(a_n), len(b_n))
for c in [cand1, cand2, cand3]:
    print(c, sim(orig, c))
